cause_analysis.narrative: Valor Lashes churned on 2026-03-28 after 176 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2026-03-20 via app_chat — 8 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made. 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 8 day(s) before churn via app_chat. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
[SLA] 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2026-04-06 via email, client wrote: "Subject: Follow up\n\nBody: Hi Anu, I'm just following up on the discovery agent service cancelation since I haven&#…" — no outbound response in 30 days.

messages.body: Subject: Follow up\n\nBody: Hi Anu, I'm just following up on the discovery agent service cancelation since I haven't heard anything back. I did delete the app and it looks like the website is down which is good but im still seeing it come up on google. When will it be taken down? Thank you.
Request Closed
